title: APS Jaipur – Teaching, Non-Teaching & Administrative Staff – 18 Posts

basic_details.job_title: APS Jaipur Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Army Public School Jaipur (APS Jaipur) Recruitment 2026 for 18 posts of Teaching, Non-Teaching & Administrative Staff. Candidates with Post Graduate, B.E or B.Tech, Graduate, 10th, 8th , B.Lib, Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through APS Jaipur official website apsjaipur.edu.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for APS Jaipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Army Public School Jaipur PGT History
